# Alfredo Barrero

> AI transformation leader based in Madrid, Spain. Global Program Lead at Netflix. 10+ years in global operations and engineering across streaming, broadcasting and the Olympic Games. Builds production AI systems — not slideware.

## Who he is

- Leads AI transformation at Netflix: built NSights, a production GenAI Data & Insights platform (Claude Agent SDK, MCP, RAG, Trino/Presto) transforming how data and insights are consumed at global scale — a data engine abstraction layer over raw tables, an agentic layer trained to use it, and three surfaces (advanced analytics dashboard, self-serve MCP, agentic copilot for qualitative insight). Returns 850+ hours per quarter to global teams.
- Led 6+ end-to-end M&A integrations of acquired companies with zero downtime.
- Previously: live broadcast infrastructure for the Olympic Games and Grand Slams (IOC/Olympic Channel).
- Telecom Engineer, PMP, MBA. Spain's Top Talent 2025.
- Founder of FuelUp (B2C & B2B2C app, live with real users) and Folia Garden (published AI plant-care app). Currently building Mente, an AI copilot for the household (iOS beta).

## Services

- AI Workshop for Teams: half-day or full-day intensive, teams of 8–15, on-site or remote.
- AI Acceleration Programme: 6–8 week cohort with weekly live sessions and hands-on implementation.
- AI Implementation Consulting: diagnose operations and build real systems — dashboards, agents, decision intelligence. Project-based, end-to-end.
- 1:1 Mentoring: for professionals who want to grow their careers with AI — practical and honest.

## Contact
